title: Luxury Yacht Rental in Marbella: Costs, Boats & Tips for 2026
html:
Marbella, on the Costa del Sol, offers world-class luxury yacht hire from Puerto José Banús, with lounges and cabins available from €3,000 to €20,000 per day. BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners for a seamless booking experience.

How much does it cost to rent a luxury yacht in Marbella?

Prices range from €2,000 for a half-day on a small motor yacht to over €20,000 for a fully crewed superyacht. The exact cost depends on the boat size, season, and included services. For a transparent breakdown of current rates and availability, you can book a charter online directly through the platform.

Where to set off in Marbella

Depart from Puerto José Banús, the glamorous marina lined with boutiques and restaurants. Other options include Puerto Deportivo de Marbella in the town centre, Cabopino Marina for a quieter start, and the port of Sotogrande, 20 nautical miles south. Many charters also head towards the Bay of Málaga or explore the coastline near Estepona. A typical day trip covers 30, 50 nautical miles, depending on your itinerary.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor Yacht (e.g. Princess V58), Ideal for groups of 8, 12, with sun pads and a flybridge; from €2,500 for a half-day. Explore the Princess V58 for hire on BoatHire24.
  2. Sailing Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 52), Perfect for 10, 12 guests who prefer stable cruising; from €3,500 for a full day.
  3. Sport or Day Cruiser (e.g. Axopar 37), Great for 6, 8 people seeking speed and water sports; from €1,500 for a half-day.
  4. Flybridge Yacht (e.g. Sunseeker Predator 74), Luxurious for up to 16 guests with a crew; from €5,000 for a full day.
  5. Superyacht (e.g. Maiora or Astondoa 30m+), For up to 20 guests with full crew; from €10,000 per day.

Costs at a glance

  • Shared tour per person: €150, €300
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): €1,500, €2,500
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): €3,500, €5,500
  • Fully crewed luxury yacht (up to 20 guests): €8,000, €20,000
In July and August, book at least three weeks ahead, the Poniente wind can freshen in the afternoon, so a morning departure often offers calmer seas. Local skippers know the best lunch spots near Cabo de Calaburras.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For bareboat rentals over 6 metres or 15 kW, a Spanish leisure boating licence is required, but all crewed vessels include a professional skipper. The operator will confirm your specific licence requirements at the time of booking. If you prefer to drive, consider a smaller boat with a day licence.

At a glance

  • Price range: €1,500, €20,000 per day
  • Peak months: July and August
  • Trip length: Half-day (4h) or full-day (8h)
  • Capacity: 6, 20 guests depending on vessel
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

What is included in the charter price?

Most luxury charters include a professional skipper, fuel, VAT, and onboard amenities such as towels and water toys; food and drinks are usually extra.

Can I celebrate a birthday or event on a yacht in Marbella?

Yes, many yachts welcome celebrations with prior arrangement, and some offer catering or DJ packages for an additional fee.

What is the cancellation policy for yacht rentals in Marbella?

Policies vary by owner, but many offer full refunds if cancelled 14 days or more in advance; always check the terms before booking.
